---
name: Issue Report
about: Report a problem that needs attention
title: "[Issue]"
labels: bug
assignees: ''

---

## **Summary**
A clear and concise description of the issue

## **Location / Context**
Where did this happen? Include floor, room, or shared area if relevant.

## **Expected Behavior**
What did you expect to happen?

## **Actual Behavior**
What actually happened?

## **Severity**
Low / Medium / High

## **Additional Context**
Photos, references, timing details, or other notes.
